overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an Assassin's Creed title, showing a hooded protagonist exploring a grand ancient library with marble columns, mosaic floors, and scroll shelves. The character walks through the main hall, ascends a grand staircase, and explores an upper level filled with scholars working at tables.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the library hall between rows of wooden scroll shelves and scholars' tables

notable_agents.action: scholar seated at table examining scrolls

entered.detail: intricate geometric patterned marble tile flooring in black and white
tall wooden shelving units filled with rolled papyrus scrolls
tall wooden shelving units filled with rolled papyrus scrolls

tall ornate marble column with decorative fluting and capitals

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through the ground floor of an ancient library, passing between tall wooden shelves filled with scrolls. The floor features intricate geometric mosaics, and scholars sit at tables working. The grand marble staircase looms ahead at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand marble staircase with stone balustrades

events.description: character steps from mosaic floor onto the grand marble staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble staircase toward the upper landing

notable_agents.action: robed figure descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide worn marble steps with central runner
ornate carved stone railing with spherical finials
decorative ceiling with recessed hexagonal coffers and red accents

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand marble staircase, leaving the ground floor behind. Stone balustrades line both sides, and the coffered ceiling becomes visible overhead. A robed figure descends the stairs in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper landing with philosopher statue and secondary staircase

events.description: reaches the upper landing featuring a large robed philosopher statue
turns left to ascend the secondary staircase to the upper corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the philosopher statue at the landing then turning left to climb secondary stairs

entered.detail: large marble statue of bearded robed figure holding a scroll
smaller staircase branching left from the main landing
ornate red patterned carpet running along the floor

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the upper landing dominated by an imposing marble statue of a robed philosopher. After a brief pause, the character turns left and ascends a secondary staircase covered with a red carpet runner.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper library corridor with scholar workstations and scroll storage

agents.ego_description: walking along the carpeted upper corridor past scholars working at long tables, occasionally glancing at scrolls

notable_agents.action: scholar bent over desk writing on papyrus with quill
scholar standing and examining a scroll

entered.detail: long wooden tables with scrolls and writing implements
wall-mounted wooden cabinets with glass fronts displaying rolled scrolls
stone railing overlooking the lower library floor
antique balance scale with chains and pans on a stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the upper library corridor, which features a red carpet runner and overlooks the main hall below. Scholars sit at long tables on the left working with scrolls, while the right wall features built-in scroll storage niches. The character passes various workstations and antique objects including a bronze weighing scale.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand ancient library, ascending from the bustling ground floor to a quiet, elevated corridor of study. It begins by following the protagonist through the main hall, passing between tall wooden scroll shelves and scholars seated upon intricate geometric mosaics. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts upward along a grand marble staircase with stone balustrades, passing a descending robed figure beneath a coffered ceiling. The camera then reaches an upper landing dominated by an imposing statue of a philosopher before turning left to climb a secondary staircase draped in a red carpet runner. Finally, the view expands along an upper corridor overlooking the hall below, gliding past workstations and bronze scales toward built-in scroll niches.
